title: Freckled Fawn - Giveaway - closed

body:
As you may already know, I have a thing for embellishments. I used to hoard them, okay, maybe I still do a little. But now I am actually really into using them on my projects. I had a chance to play with the OHDEERME October kit items for a Sweet 16 where we created a scrapbook on site. It was my first time leaving Jack for more than 4 hours. Turns out daddy had a great time on Saturday night duty, and successfully fed him a couple bottles (I have been pumping since Jack was about a week old). Sorry if that was TMI, I just thought it was relevant and some may ask about formula feeding, and whatnot. Anyway, I used the cute sequin bow on a corner of a page.

I also sprinkled elements throughout this Project Life spread, as seen on Becky Higgins Creative Team post for October. The wood feathers and LOVE paperclip are possibly my favorite elements from the kit. Oh and of course I love the "this is magic" stamp as well.

About the Kit Club | The monthly OHDEERME Embellishment Kit is an exciting new concept in the scrapbook world. Each month, Freckled Fawn designs and manufactures a collection of coordinating embellishment. You will receive a tin filled with enough embellishment to inspire you as you create dozens of lovely projects! With the OHDEERME embellishments in hand, browsing your personal paper stash each month will become an exciting endeavor.

Connect with Freckled Fawn | [ Shop ]  [ Kit Club ]  [ Facebook ]  [ Instagram ]

Giveaway Closed | Freckled Fawn is giving an October kit to one of Amy's readers! Leave a comment letting us know your favorite part of the October kit. Comments will close on October 22 at 7am PST and a winner will be announced on this post shortly after. GOOD LUCK!

Winner is: #101 - Jessica Dougherty says: October 20, 2013 at 6:37 pm

The wooden fox heads are fabulous!

CONGRATS! Promotion | Become a new subscriber and receive an embellishment grab bag. Use the code AMYSUB at checkout. Code must be entered at checkout and cannot work retroactively. Code expires October 25. Grab bag will ship with first kit.
